final_prompt: In a top-down view of a picnic blanket, exactly five objects are arranged in a circle: a red apple at the top, a blue ceramic mug on the right, a yellow banana at the bottom, a green glass bottle on the left, and a small white plate precisely in the center. The blanket is clearly visible beneath them.

constraints: The image is taken from a top-down (bird's-eye) view.
There is a picnic blanket visible.
There are exactly five objects on the blanket.
The objects are arranged in a circle around the center.
A red apple is at the top of the arrangement.
A blue ceramic mug is on the right side.
A yellow banana is at the bottom.
A green glass bottle is on the left side.
A small white plate is in the center.
